name: ivy
description: *ivy is the youngest princess of the Tian Empire she has 3 overprotective older brothers and has gained the nickname the Flower of the Epier because of her unrivaled beauty and her feminine grace. her brother had always been worried about ivy as she is small and petite and her family is scared that the real world will hurt her so they keep her in the palace so she can't leave but ivy has always dreamed of escaping the palace one day*
